summary: All 4 pilot pages load 200 from preview and are present in da.live; homepage images fixed (no about:error); text fidelity ≥ 84% on all pages vs da.live source; 3 medium/low issues documented but none are blockers per orchestrator acceptance criteria.

pageResults.note: da.live source stored with .html extension — 404 without extension on admin API, but EDS preview routing works correctly

Image ratio 0.11 is a known da.live limitation: accordion block cells strip external images during pipeline processing. Hero image renders correctly (media_ hash). 8 section images are in da.live source as external juvederm.nl URLs but not rendered. Accepted per orchestrator.

issues.details: Homepage blueprint (blueprint.json archetypes[0].pageModel) specifies 7 sections: hero, default-content, carousel, cards, accordion (section 5), cta-band (section 6), footnotes (section 7). The migrated da.live source (admin.da.live/source/jmffraiz/jv-test-5/index) has only 5 blocks: Hero (video), Cards (no-images), Carousel, Cards, Columns. The accordion block is absent; its content was omitted or merged. The CTA and regulatory footnotes sections are embedded within the Columns block rather than as separate EDS sections, so section-metadata styling (cta-band, footnotes) is missing.
issues.evidence: GET https://admin.da.live/source/jmffraiz/jv-test-5/index → 6 <table> elements: Hero (video), Cards (no-images), Carousel, Cards, Columns, Metadata. No Accordion or Section Metadata tables found.
issues.remediation: Add a separate Accordion block for the 'product details' section per blueprint section 5. Add Section Metadata blocks for cta-band and footnotes sections. Move 'Vind je kliniek' CTA and regulatory text into their own EDS sections.

issues.criterion: Content is complete and faithful / Image sustainability
issues.details: Lips and QA pages store content images as external juvederm.nl CDN URLs in the da.live source HTML (e.g., https://www.juvederm.nl/adobe/dynamicmedia/deliver/dm-aid--*). These are not uploaded to the da.live media store. If the source CDN blocks hotlinking or becomes unavailable, images will break. Only the homepage images were properly uploaded to da.live media store as media_ hash URLs. QA hero image renders correctly (EDS processed it to media_18b20... hash), but 8 section images within accordion cells are external URLs that the pipeline strips.
issues.evidence: GET /tmp/da_lips2.html → all values point to https://www.juvederm.nl/adobe/dynamicmedia/deliver/... (no media_ hashes). GET /tmp/da_qa.html → all 9 images are external URLs. Only the QA hero image was re-processed by EDS preview to a media_ hash.
issues.remediation: Upload lips and QA section images to da.live media store (POST to admin.da.live/source/jmffraiz/jv-test-5/media/<filename>), then replace external URLs in da.live HTML with media_ hash references. This matches the pattern used for homepage images.

issues.details: The lips page da.live source URL requires the .html extension: admin.da.live/source/jmffraiz/jv-test-5/nl/treatment/lips.html returns 200, but without extension returns 404. The status file daSourceUrl field lists the path with .html, which is non-standard for da.live document URLs. EDS preview routing handles this transparently (preview URL /nl/treatment/lips returns 200 without extension), but the .html extension in da.live may cause confusion for authors.
issues.remediation: Consider re-uploading the lips document without .html extension so da.live path matches standard EDS conventions: admin.da.live/source/jmffraiz/jv-test-5/nl/treatment/lips

issues.details: The disclaimer page selfCheck (from worker status file) recorded 'failed to load module for metadata (metadata.js 404)'. This was a historical error during the original migration. Independent verification confirms metadata.js now returns HTTP 200 at https://main--jv-test-5--jmffraiz.aem.page/blocks/metadata/metadata.js. No current JS errors detected in HTML inspection.
issues.remediation: No action required — metadata.js is already present and functional.
